description: An account manager wants to schedule ads to run only during business hours (9 AM - 5 PM, Monday-Friday) to target B2B customers.

nodes.task_description: Navigate to the ad scheduling settings for the target campaign.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct settings in the ad platform.

nodes.task_description: Create a custom ad schedule for Monday to Friday, from 9:00 to 17:00.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully inputs the desired schedule.
The campaign is now configured to only run ads during the specified times.
